response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished polyglot engineer with strong testing practices and some infrastructure experience, he falls well short of the critical C++ requirement (only ~6 months in 2014-2015 versus 8 years minimum) and lacks the specialized cloud compute platform expertise this role demands. His 16-year career has been primarily product-focused on web and TypeScript development, not systems programming or infrastructure engineering.
strengths: Demonstrated excellence in testing, TDD, and software craftsmanship across diverse technical roles with 16+ years experience
Proven ability to learn multiple programming languages and lead technical initiatives, currently at Staff-level position with mentoring history
Some relevant infrastructure exposure through AWS CDK, Kubernetes, micro-services at scale (millions of HTTP requests/second), and DevOps tooling
concerns: Critical gap: only ~6 months of C++ experience from 2014-2015, far below the 8-year minimum requirement and expertise needed for core platform work
Career trajectory is primarily web products and full-stack development, not cloud infrastructure, systems programming, or compute platform specialization
Limited evidence of technical leadership specifically in infrastructure or cloud domains; Staff role appears product-focused rather than platform-focused
